name: Beef Jerkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Select a 1/2 inch thick flank or top round steak. Trim away all fat and partially freeze until firm.
2. Slice across the grain into 1/4 to 1/2 inch wide strips.
3. Place meat strips in a shallow dish or heavy plastic bag. Add soy or teriyaki sauce to cover meat. If desired, add onion, garlic powder, or Worcestershire sauce. Toss to coat each piece.
4. Cover and refrigerate several hours or overnight.
5. Lift the meat from the marinade, drain well, then air dry for a couple of hours.
6. Arrange meat strips in a single layer on a fine wire screen or cake cooling rack.
7. Place in a low oven (175°F to 200°F) or slowly smoke-cook in a smoker until meat is completely dried.
8. Store in an airtight container. Serve as a snack or appetizer.
